name: West Bengal MSME Credit Support Scheme
administered_by: Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises and Textiles Department, Government of West Bengal
retrieval_text: The Government of West Bengal provides credit support and guarantee facilitation to micro and small enterprises in the state through its MSME and Textiles Department. The scheme facilitates collateral-free lending up to Rs 2 crore by facilitating CGTMSE guarantee cover and, in certain cases, providing state-level guarantee fee reimbursement. The scheme is intended to complement central government credit guarantee mechanisms and improve credit flow to first-generation and underserved MSMEs across manufacturing, services, and trading sectors in West Bengal. Interest rate is set by the lending institution.
